description:
Type: 100% Polyester, Home Decor, One-Side Printing

Made of high quality peach skin fabric (100% polyester), perfect for both indoor and outdoor use. This tapestry can be easily hung and retracted, making it versatile for any occasion.

Personalized with a photo collage, printed in full color for a unique and vibrant design that brings your space to life.

Four hanging ropes, easy to hang without damaging the wall.

Ideal for wall hangings, dorm decorations, beach throws, picnic sheets, porch hangings, tablecloths, or any occasion that needs a touch of character and style.

To maintain its quality, hand wash or machine wash gently. Iron at low temperature. Do not bleach.
